'''Carosi X''' was the tenth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Carosus system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Carosi X was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in orbit around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Carosi]]. The planet had ten [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. When the Carosus system's sun expanded to become a red giant at around [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]], it consumed the five innermost worlds in the system. Because of this, Carosi X became the fifth planet in the Carosus system.
